title: Lena Moreau — The Desk at Night
atmospheric_profile: writer's desk at night: manual typewriter with half-finished letter 'My dearest, the summer we spoke last...', vase of dried wildflowers, matchbox, faded porch photograph, soft lamplight and cool window light — the quiet, lived-in space of memory and reconciliation
quality_notes: Powerful creator continuity. The typewriter, letter fragment, flowers, and photo create recognizable emotional DNA for Lena Moreau's world. Dreamlike intimacy and surreal stillness.
creator_continuity: Lena Moreau - recurring typewriter, letters, dried flowers, porch photo, warm + cool light
